matcher_value: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $available = [bool](Get-Command Get-ClusterSharedVolume -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); $csv = @(); if ($available) { $csv = @(Get-ClusterSharedVolume | Select-Object Name, State, OwnerNode) }; [pscustomobject]@{ cluster_shared_volume_available = $available; csv_count = @($csv).Count; csv = $csv } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6
